product.title: IT Cosmetics CC+ Cream Natural Matte - Poreless Full Coverage Foundation With SPF 40, 16HR Shine Control, Color-Corrector, Skin-Balancing Serum, Sweat-proof, Noncomedogenic for Oily Skin - 1.08 fl oz

primaryFeatures.color: 13N Neutral Medium (medium with neutral pink undertones)

featureBullets: WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT – CC+ Cream Natural Matte is our best foundation for oily skin. This longwear matte foundation controls shine, corrects color, balances skin, and provides broad-spectrum sunscreen all in one

INGREDIENTS – Formulated with Air Licium for blurring and shine control, Lentil Seed Extract to minimize pores, 2% Niacinamide to help promote more even-toned skin, Hyaluronic Acid for hydration, and SPF 40 for UVA/UVB sun protection. This smooth natural matte finish never looks flat or dries out your skin. The formula has been clinically tested and shown to improve the feel of skin softness after 8 weeks of daily use

BENEFITS – Sweat- and humidity-proof formula offers 16HR shine control, 24HR hydration, and sun protection without white cast. Improves bare skin texture after 8 weeks. This noncomedogenic foundation is ideal for oily, combination, sensitive, and acne-prone skin

IT REALLY WORKS – Our best CC cream for oily skin immediately blurs the look of pores as it works to flawlessly cover fine lines, skin imperfections, dark circles, facial redness, discoloration, and uneven skin tone.

DISCOVER IT – Apply 1-2 pumps on clean skin. Build coverage as desired with Complexion Perfection #7 makeup brush for buffing and blending. Find your favorite multi-tasking foundation : CC+ Original (full coverage, natural finish), CC+ Nude Glow (medium coverage skin tint, glowy finish), CC+ Illumination (full coverage, radiant finish), CC+ Natural Matte (full coverage, pore-less matte finish)

specification.value: 13N Neutral Medium (medium with neutral pink undertones)
Addresses oily skin concerns by instantly blurring large pores and covering facial redness and uneven skin tone.
#5,550 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #7 in CC Facial Creams

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers love the foundation's full coverage and appreciate its long-lasting properties. The texture receives mixed feedback - while many find it feels like their skin without being heavy, some mention it feels greasy. The matte finish and application also get mixed reviews, with some finding it perfect while others say it looks cakey and doesn't go on smoothly. The color receives mixed reactions, with some saying it matches their skin tone well while others find it too light.

reviews.reviewTitle: Natural Matte CC Cream That Blurs Pores
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using the IT Cosmetics CC+ Natural Matte and I’m genuinely impressed. It gives full coverage without feeling heavy, and it really does blur the look of pores while keeping my skin looking natural — not cakey or flat. The matte finish is perfect if you have oily or combo skin, but it’s not drying at all. It wears beautifully throughout the day and doesn’t break apart or get shiny by midday. I also love that it has SPF 40 built in, so it feels like makeup and skincare in one step. A little goes a long way, blends easily with a brush or sponge, and it looks even better as the day goes on. This has quickly become my go-to everyday base when I want my skin to look smooth, even, and put together with minimal effort. Highly recommend if you want coverage + oil control + sun protection in one product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 15, 2025

productSpecs.color: 11W Light Medium Warm (light with yellow undertones)

reviews.reviewTitle: Great product even for mature skin light coverage
reviews.reviewText: I love this product. Only a dab covers like high end foundation. Leaves skin soft and it matte finish. I am 76 and it is a nice coverage minimizing pores and winkles. It’s my second tube. Love it !highly recommend although it us pricy. Last a while due to using very little
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026

productSpecs.color: 13N Neutral Medium (medium with neutral pink undertones)

reviews.reviewText: This is my go to everyday CC Cream, I’ve been using for over two years now, works great on my skin, I live in very humid climate and it’s perfect and lasts long
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Good for hot weather and humidity but not for dry weather
reviews.reviewText: I have oily skin and I have mixed feeling with this product. If you apply a moisturizer first, then this product it works well specially with humid climates. If you apply this product in a dry climate, it will pop out your wrinkles due to the lack of moisture, or you can add a deeper moisturizer as a base. So I like having this in hand for when I am in hot and humid weather climate, but I do not recommended for dry climates.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026

productSpecs.color: 10N Light Medium (light with neutral peach undertones)

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage and only need a little. Small tube is great for traveling or keep one in guest bathroom. Last a long time if you don't use it daily. No breakouts. Skin always look beautiful. Love the small size. Need different shades for different seasons so small size, small price works for me. Give it a try!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 4, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This foundation is absolutely amazing!!! I had been looking for a full coverage foundation that would cover the redness due to my rosacea and I was having a lot of trouble finding one. Everytime I thought I found one, it would only stay on for a few hours and then my redness would come through again. Not with this foundation though. It stays on for my entire work day and keeps the redness on my cheeks at bay. I also love that it does not feel like you are wearing a ton of makeup, even though it is providing a full coverage. I do not feel greasy or heavy with it on. It is a great option for skin with rosacea.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2025

productSpecs.color: 10N Light Medium (light with neutral peach undertones)

reviews.reviewText: Love this makeup. Looks good. Not tacky. Last all day with all the coverage you desire. Try a no-makeup look or maximum coverage. Feels like your skin and it is smudge resistant. There is also a great selection of shades.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Full Coverage But Makes My Blemishes Very Noticeable
reviews.reviewText: The foundation does give full coverage, however, I don't like that it enhances my blemishes and a few dry patches. It looks great from afar, but the closer you get, the worse it looks. It makes my face look patchy, cakey, and dry. It won't set either. I have to keep blending out certain areas throughout the day. The sunscreen makes the shade look a little ghostly at first, and then it settles after an hour or so. The shade range is confusing due to the sunscreen, and I spent quite a bit of money trying to find the right shade because of that.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 19, 2025
